allow: Bash(npm install @dnd-kit/core @dnd-kit/sortable @dnd-kit/utilities @supabase/supabase-js @supabase/ssr openai zod nanoid lucide-react zustand)
Bash(npx shadcn@latest add card input textarea label select dialog dropdown-menu tabs scroll-area separator badge switch form tooltip sheet radio-group checkbox -y)

Bash(node -e "const OpenAI = require\(''openai''\); const o = new OpenAI\({apiKey: ''test''}\); console.log\(Object.keys\(o.chat?.completions || {}\).filter\(k => typeof o.chat.completions[k] === ''function''\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const OpenAI = require\(''openai''\); const o = new OpenAI\({apiKey: ''test''}\); console.log\(''chat:'', typeof o.chat\); console.log\(''responses:'', typeof o.responses\); console.log\(''chat.completions:'', typeof o.chat?.completions\); console.log\(''beta:'', Object.keys\(o.beta || {}\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const OpenAI = require\(''openai''\); const o = new OpenAI\({apiKey: ''test''}\); const cc = o.chat.completions; console.log\(''create:'', typeof cc.create\); console.log\(''parse:'', typeof cc.parse\); console.log\(''stream:'', typeof cc.stream\);")
